title: Level Z - Paladins and Priests
description: LevelZ Addon For Paladins & Priests Mod from the RPG Series.
body:
A LevelZ Addon for the Paladins and Priests mod.

This addon adds level requirements for Paladin and Priest weapons and armors to fit seemlessly with LevelZ. This way you can add the Paladins and Priests mod to your RPG modpacks without worrying about people skipping progression.

This one in particular is an adaptation of Ryn's version of this add-on. I made some changes, namely calibrating the levels with the ones I set in other add-ons of this type, added missing levels for holy weapons and smithing restrictions.

Did I miss something or do you have any further suggestions for other mods I should make compatible? Follow the discord link and let me know!
